title: Michigan SCAO Court Forms — Comprehensive Catalogue
description: Comprehensive listing of Michigan State Court Administrative Office (SCAO) approved court forms, organized by form family. Covers multi-court, circuit, district, probate, juvenile, domestic relations, FOC, PPO, criminal, and appellate forms.

families.name: MC — Multi-Court (General) Forms
families.description: General-purpose forms used across all Michigan court divisions, including motions, orders, service documents, fee waivers, and case management tools.

forms.title: Case Inventory Addendum
forms.purpose: Supplements the case inventory with additional party or case information.

forms.title: Certificate of Conformity for Domestic Business Entity
forms.purpose: Certifies that a business entity is in good standing with LARA before filing suit.

forms.title: Fee Waiver Request
forms.purpose: Requests waiver of court filing fees based on indigency or public assistance.

forms.title: Verification of Income and Assets (Fee Waiver)
forms.purpose: Sworn statement of income, assets, and expenses supporting a fee waiver request.

forms.title: Order Regarding Fee Waiver
forms.purpose: Court order granting or denying the fee waiver request.

forms.title: Subpoena
forms.purpose: Commands a witness to appear and/or produce documents at a hearing, trial, or deposition.

forms.title: Notice of Hearing
forms.purpose: Provides notice to parties of a scheduled hearing date and time.

forms.title: Order
forms.purpose: General-purpose order form following a hearing or ruling.

forms.title: Order on Motion/Stipulation
forms.purpose: Court order entered on a motion or stipulation between parties.

forms.title: Proof of Mailing
forms.purpose: Certifies that documents were mailed to parties or other persons.

forms.title: Order Regarding Adjournment
forms.purpose: Court order granting or denying a request to adjourn a hearing or trial.

forms.title: Stipulation and Order for Adjournment
forms.purpose: Parties' written agreement to adjourn, with court approval.

forms.title: Motion
forms.purpose: General-purpose motion form for filing any motion with the court.

forms.title: Case Evaluation Award / Summary
forms.purpose: Records the case evaluation panel's award under the mediation/evaluation process.

forms.title: Response to Case Evaluation Award
forms.purpose: Party's acceptance or rejection of the case evaluation award.

forms.title: Request for Case Evaluation
forms.purpose: Initiates the case evaluation process for a civil action.

forms.title: Advice of Rights — Misdemeanor
forms.purpose: Advises a defendant of constitutional rights at arraignment on a misdemeanor charge.

forms.title: Judgment of Sentence — Misdemeanor
forms.purpose: Final judgment and sentence form for misdemeanor convictions.

forms.title: Application for Assigned Counsel
forms.purpose: Request for court-appointed attorney based on financial inability to retain counsel.

forms.title: Order Appointing / Denying Counsel
forms.purpose: Court order appointing or denying assignment of counsel to a defendant.

forms.title: Sentencing Information Report
forms.purpose: Collects sentencing guidelines information for the Michigan Sentencing Commission.

forms.title: Order of Restitution
forms.purpose: Orders defendant to pay restitution to the victim(s).

forms.title: Case Conference Order [UNVERIFIED]
forms.purpose: Records outcomes and deadlines from a case conference.

forms.title: Application to Set Aside Conviction
forms.purpose: Petition to expunge / set aside a criminal conviction.

forms.title: Order on Application to Set Aside Conviction
forms.purpose: Court order granting or denying expungement of conviction.

forms.title: Notice to Victims — Set Aside Application [UNVERIFIED]
forms.purpose: Notice to victims that the defendant has applied to set aside a conviction.

forms.title: e-Filing Notice / Exemption Request
forms.purpose: Request for exemption from mandatory electronic filing.

families.name: CC — Circuit Court Forms
families.description: Forms specific to civil actions in the Circuit Court, Michigan's general-jurisdiction trial court.

forms.title: Summons — Civil Action
forms.purpose: Summons for commencing a civil action in circuit court.

forms.title: Complaint — Civil
forms.purpose: General civil complaint form for circuit court cases.

forms.title: Affidavit of Judgment Creditor — Garnishment
forms.purpose: Supports post-judgment garnishment of wages or assets.

forms.title: Request and Writ of Garnishment (Periodic)
forms.purpose: Writ directing periodic garnishment of wages after judgment.

forms.title: Request and Writ of Garnishment (Non-Periodic)
forms.purpose: Writ directing garnishment of bank accounts or non-periodic assets.

forms.title: Garnishee Disclosure
forms.purpose: Garnishee's sworn response regarding assets or funds held for the judgment debtor.

forms.title: Objection to Garnishment
forms.purpose: Party or garnishee's objection to the garnishment writ.

forms.title: Order After Hearing on Garnishment
forms.purpose: Court order resolving garnishment objections or disputes.

forms.title: Petition for Personal Protection Order (Domestic)
forms.purpose: Initiates a PPO request in a domestic relationship case.

forms.title: Personal Protection Order (Domestic Relationship)
forms.purpose: Ex parte PPO entered against a respondent in a domestic relationship.

forms.title: Personal Protection Order (Non-Domestic / Stalking)
forms.purpose: Ex parte PPO for stalking or non-domestic harassment.

forms.title: Motion to Terminate or Modify PPO
forms.purpose: Respondent's motion to set aside or modify a personal protection order.

forms.title: Proof of Service — PPO
forms.purpose: Proof that the PPO was served on the respondent.

forms.title: Order Regarding Personal Protection Order
forms.purpose: Court order after hearing on motion to terminate, modify, or extend a PPO.

forms.title: Petition for Personal Protection Order (Minor)
forms.purpose: PPO petition filed on behalf of a minor.

forms.title: Response to Petition for PPO [UNVERIFIED]
forms.purpose: Respondent's written response contesting the petition for a PPO.

forms.title: Order for Mediation
forms.purpose: Court order referring a civil case to mediation.

families.name: DC — District Court Forms
families.description: Forms for the District Court, handling civil claims up to $25,000, landlord-tenant, small claims, and misdemeanors.

forms.title: Summons and Complaint — Land Contract Forfeiture
forms.purpose: Commences action to forfeit a land contract for nonpayment.

forms.title: Summons and Complaint — Nonpayment of Rent
forms.purpose: Commences eviction action for failure to pay rent.

forms.title: Summons and Complaint — Termination of Tenancy
forms.purpose: Commences eviction action for lease termination or holdover tenancy.

forms.title: Summons and Complaint — Health Hazard / Damage to Premises
forms.purpose: Eviction action for causing health hazards or damage to the premises.

forms.title: Affidavit / Claim of Damages — Landlord-Tenant
forms.purpose: Landlord's sworn claim for damages beyond the security deposit.

forms.title: Consent Judgment — Landlord-Tenant
forms.purpose: Agreed-upon judgment between landlord and tenant to resolve the case.

forms.title: Order of Eviction / Judgment
forms.purpose: Final judgment and order of eviction in a landlord-tenant case.

forms.title: Writ of Restitution
forms.purpose: Commands the court officer to physically remove the tenant and restore possession.

forms.title: Claim of Exemption / Third-Party Claim
forms.purpose: Debtor's claim of exemption from garnishment or execution.

forms.title: Small Claims Affidavit and Claim
forms.purpose: Initiates a small claims action (up to $6,500).

forms.title: Notice of Small Claims Hearing
forms.purpose: Notice to defendant of small claims hearing date.

forms.title: Small Claims Judgment
forms.purpose: Judgment form for small claims cases.

forms.title: Affidavit and Claim — General Civil
forms.purpose: Initiates a general civil infraction or civil action in district court.

forms.title: Installment Payment Order — District Court [UNVERIFIED]
forms.purpose: Court order setting installment payments for a judgment.

forms.title: Judgment — General Civil
forms.purpose: Final judgment in a district court general civil case.

families.name: FOC — Friend of the Court Forms
families.description: Forms for custody, parenting time, and child support proceedings administered through the Friend of the Court.

forms.title: Advice of Rights Regarding Use of Friend of the Court Services
forms.purpose: Informs parties of FOC services, rights to opt out, and objection procedures.

forms.title: Domestic Relations Mediation Report [UNVERIFIED]
forms.purpose: Mediator's report to the court following FOC mediation.

forms.title: Uniform Child Support Order
forms.purpose: Standardized order establishing or modifying child support obligations.

forms.title: Uniform Spousal Support Order
forms.purpose: Standardized order establishing or modifying spousal support (alimony).

forms.title: Uniform Support Order (Combined)
forms.purpose: Combined child support and spousal support order.

forms.title: Addendum to Uniform Support Order [UNVERIFIED]
forms.purpose: Supplemental terms to the uniform support order.

forms.title: Verified Statement and Application for Title IV-D Services
forms.purpose: Sworn financial disclosure and application for IV-D child support enforcement services.

forms.title: Friend of the Court Case Questionnaire [UNVERIFIED]
forms.purpose: Collects information from parties for FOC recommendation regarding custody, support, and parenting time.

forms.title: Objection to Referee's Recommended Order
forms.purpose: Formal objection to an order recommended by the FOC referee.

forms.title: Motion to Change Custody, Parenting Time, and Support [UNVERIFIED]
forms.purpose: Combined motion seeking modification of custody, parenting time, and/or support.

forms.title: Order on Referee Hearing
forms.purpose: Court order adopting, rejecting, or modifying the FOC referee recommendation.

forms.title: Referee Recommendation
forms.purpose: Written recommendation of the FOC referee following hearing.

forms.title: Support Recommendation
forms.purpose: FOC's recommendation regarding child and/or spousal support.

forms.title: Motion Regarding Support
forms.purpose: Motion to establish, modify, or enforce child or spousal support.

forms.title: Motion Regarding Custody
forms.purpose: Motion to establish or modify custody of minor children.

forms.title: Motion Regarding Parenting Time
forms.purpose: Motion to establish, modify, or enforce a parenting time order.

forms.title: Response to Motion Regarding Custody / Parenting Time / Support
forms.purpose: Responding party's answer to a post-judgment domestic relations motion.

forms.title: Order Regarding Parenting Time
forms.purpose: Court order establishing or modifying parenting time (visitation).

forms.title: Motion Regarding Change of Domicile
forms.purpose: Motion seeking permission or objecting to relocation of a child's domicile.

forms.title: Advice of Rights — Show Cause / Contempt
forms.purpose: Advises a party of rights before a contempt proceeding for violating a court order.

forms.title: Response to Show Cause for Contempt
forms.purpose: Written response to an order to show cause why a party should not be held in contempt.

forms.title: Motion and Order to Show Cause (Contempt)
forms.purpose: Motion requesting that a party be ordered to appear and show cause why they should not be held in contempt.

families.name: PC — Probate Court Forms
families.description: Forms for the Probate Court: estates, guardianships, conservatorships, trusts, and mental health proceedings.

forms.title: Petition for Appointment of Guardian of Minor
forms.purpose: Requests appointment of a guardian for a minor child.

forms.title: Petition for Appointment of Guardian of Incapacitated Individual
forms.purpose: Requests appointment of a guardian for a legally incapacitated adult.

forms.title: Order Appointing Guardian
forms.purpose: Court order appointing a guardian for a minor or incapacitated individual.

forms.title: Acceptance of Appointment — Guardian
forms.purpose: Guardian's sworn acceptance of fiduciary appointment and duties.

forms.title: Petition for Appointment of Conservator
forms.purpose: Requests appointment of a conservator to manage a protected person's finances.

forms.title: Order Appointing Conservator
forms.purpose: Court order appointing a conservator.

forms.title: Acceptance of Appointment — Conservator
forms.purpose: Conservator's sworn acceptance of appointment and fiduciary duties.

forms.title: Letters of Authority (Guardian / Conservator)
forms.purpose: Official letters documenting the guardian's or conservator's authority.

forms.title: Annual Report of Guardian
forms.purpose: Guardian's annual report on the ward's condition, residence, and services.

forms.title: Annual Account of Conservator
forms.purpose: Conservator's annual financial accounting to the court.

forms.title: Petition for Removal of Guardian or Conservator [UNVERIFIED]
forms.purpose: Requests removal of a guardian or conservator for cause.

forms.title: Petition to Terminate Guardianship / Conservatorship [UNVERIFIED]
forms.purpose: Requests termination of the guardianship or conservatorship.

forms.title: Application for Informal Probate and/or Appointment of Personal Representative
forms.purpose: Initiates informal probate of a will and/or appointment of personal representative.

forms.title: Statement of Personal Representative
forms.purpose: Sworn acceptance of appointment and notice of duties by the personal representative.

forms.title: Testimony to Identify Heirs
forms.purpose: Identifies the decedent's heirs at law for the probate court.

forms.title: Letters of Authority (Personal Representative)
forms.purpose: Official letters documenting the personal representative's authority over the estate.

forms.title: Notice to Creditors (Decedent's Estate)
forms.purpose: Publication notice to creditors of the estate to file claims.

forms.title: Notice of Appointment and Duties of Personal Representative
forms.purpose: Notifies interested persons of the personal representative's appointment.

forms.title: Petition for Formal Probate / Appointment of Personal Representative [UNVERIFIED]
forms.purpose: Initiates formal (supervised) probate proceedings.

forms.title: Inventory of Estate [UNVERIFIED]
forms.purpose: Lists all assets of the estate within 91 days of appointment.

forms.title: Sworn Closing Statement
forms.purpose: Closes an estate under informal proceedings by sworn statement.

forms.title: Petition for Complete Estate Settlement
forms.purpose: Requests final settlement and distribution of the estate.

forms.title: Order for Complete Estate Settlement [UNVERIFIED]
forms.purpose: Court order approving final settlement and distribution.

forms.title: Petition for Mental Health Treatment
forms.purpose: Petitions for involuntary mental health treatment of an individual.

forms.title: Clinical Certificate — Mental Health
forms.purpose: Licensed professional's certification supporting involuntary treatment.

forms.title: Order for Involuntary Mental Health Treatment [UNVERIFIED]
forms.purpose: Court order for involuntary hospitalization or treatment.

forms.title: Petition for Judicial Admission [UNVERIFIED]
forms.purpose: Petition for non-emergency judicial admission for mental health treatment.

families.name: JC — Juvenile Court Forms
families.description: Forms for juvenile delinquency, child protective proceedings, and juvenile guardianship.

forms.title: Petition (Delinquency)
forms.purpose: Initiates a juvenile delinquency proceeding.

forms.title: Petition (Child Protective)
forms.purpose: Initiates a child protective proceeding based on allegations of abuse or neglect.

forms.title: Summons — Juvenile
forms.purpose: Summons to parents/guardian to appear in juvenile court.

forms.title: Order Following Preliminary Hearing (Delinquency)
forms.purpose: Court order after the preliminary hearing in a delinquency case.

forms.title: Order Following Preliminary Hearing (Child Protective)
forms.purpose: Court order after the preliminary hearing in a child protective proceeding.

forms.title: Order of Disposition — Juvenile [UNVERIFIED]
forms.purpose: Final dispositional order in a juvenile matter.

forms.title: Order Placing Child / Juvenile [UNVERIFIED]
forms.purpose: Order placing a child in foster care or a treatment facility.

forms.title: Advice of Rights — Juvenile
forms.purpose: Informs the juvenile of constitutional rights at each stage.

forms.title: Petition for Termination of Parental Rights
forms.purpose: Initiates proceedings to terminate a parent's legal rights.

forms.title: Order Terminating Parental Rights
forms.purpose: Court order permanently terminating parental rights.

forms.title: Consent to Adoption — Juvenile Court [UNVERIFIED]
forms.purpose: Parent's consent to adoption within a juvenile court proceeding.

forms.title: Review Hearing Order — Child Protective [UNVERIFIED]
forms.purpose: Court order following a periodic review hearing in a child protective case.

families.name: DM — Domestic Relations Forms
families.description: Forms for divorce, separate maintenance, annulment, and related family law matters filed in Circuit Court — Family Division.

forms.title: Summons — Divorce / Separate Maintenance
forms.purpose: Summons for commencing a divorce or separate maintenance action.

forms.title: Complaint for Divorce — No Children
forms.purpose: Complaint initiating divorce where no minor children are involved.

forms.title: Complaint for Divorce — With Children
forms.purpose: Complaint initiating divorce where minor children are involved.

forms.title: Answer — Divorce / Separate Maintenance
forms.purpose: Defendant's answer to a complaint for divorce or separate maintenance.

forms.title: Counterclaim for Divorce [UNVERIFIED]
forms.purpose: Defendant's counterclaim seeking divorce.

forms.title: Judgment of Divorce — No Children
forms.purpose: Final judgment dissolving a marriage where no minor children are involved.

forms.title: Judgment of Divorce — With Children
forms.purpose: Final judgment dissolving a marriage and addressing custody, support, and parenting time.

forms.title: Uniform Child Custody Order
forms.purpose: Standardized order establishing or modifying legal and physical custody.

forms.title: Default and Default Judgment — Divorce [UNVERIFIED]
forms.purpose: Requests entry of default when defendant fails to respond.

forms.title: Ex Parte Order — Domestic Relations [UNVERIFIED]
forms.purpose: Request for emergency ex parte relief (temporary custody, support, etc.).

forms.title: Petition for Separate Maintenance [UNVERIFIED]
forms.purpose: Initiates a separate maintenance action without seeking divorce.

forms.title: Domestic Relations Temporary Order
forms.purpose: Temporary order addressing custody, support, and property pending final judgment.

forms.title: Settlement Agreement / Consent Judgment [UNVERIFIED]
forms.purpose: Written agreement of the parties resolving all issues in the divorce.

forms.title: Verified Financial Information Form
forms.purpose: Sworn financial disclosure required in domestic relations proceedings.

forms.title: Proof of Service — Domestic Relations
forms.purpose: Proof that divorce/domestic relations pleadings were served.

forms.title: Application for IV-D Services — Domestic Relations [UNVERIFIED]
forms.purpose: Application for Title IV-D child support enforcement services.

families.name: PPO — Personal Protection Order Forms
families.description: Personal protection orders filed in Circuit Court. These forms are in the CC series but collected here by topic for convenience.

forms.title: Petition for Personal Protection Order (Domestic Relationship)
forms.purpose: Petitions for a PPO against a person with whom the petitioner has a domestic relationship.

forms.title: Personal Protection Order (Domestic Relationship)
forms.purpose: The ex parte PPO itself, enforceable upon service on the respondent.

forms.title: Personal Protection Order (Non-Domestic / Stalking)
forms.purpose: Ex parte PPO for stalking, harassment, or non-domestic situations.

forms.title: Motion to Terminate or Modify Personal Protection Order
forms.purpose: Respondent's motion to dissolve or modify the PPO after entry.

forms.title: Proof of Service — Personal Protection Order
forms.purpose: Documents that the PPO was personally served on the respondent.

forms.title: Order After Hearing Regarding PPO
forms.purpose: Court order following contested hearing on a PPO.

forms.title: Petition for Personal Protection Order (Minor)
forms.purpose: PPO petition filed on behalf of a minor by a parent or guardian.

forms.title: Motion to Extend PPO [UNVERIFIED]
forms.purpose: Motion to extend a personal protection order before it expires.

forms.title: Notice of Hearing — PPO [UNVERIFIED]
forms.purpose: Notice to the respondent of a hearing on a PPO motion.

families.name: CR — Criminal Forms
families.description: Criminal case forms are primarily in the MC series (MC 200+). Collected here for reference by topic.

forms.title: Advice of Rights — Misdemeanor
forms.purpose: Advises a misdemeanor defendant of arraignment rights (counsel, silence, plea).

forms.title: Judgment of Sentence — Misdemeanor
forms.purpose: Final judgment and sentence for misdemeanor convictions.

forms.title: Application for Assigned Counsel
forms.purpose: Application for court-appointed attorney when defendant is indigent.

forms.title: Order Appointing / Denying Counsel
forms.purpose: Court's order on the assigned counsel application.

forms.title: Sentencing Information Report
forms.purpose: Information for sentencing guidelines scored by the court.

forms.title: Order of Restitution
forms.purpose: Orders defendant to pay victim restitution.

forms.title: Application to Set Aside Conviction
forms.purpose: Application to expunge a criminal conviction from the record.

forms.title: Order on Application to Set Aside Conviction
forms.purpose: Court order granting or denying the expungement application.

forms.title: Felony Information [UNVERIFIED]
forms.purpose: Formal charging document for felonies in circuit court.

forms.title: Judgment of Sentence — Felony [UNVERIFIED]
forms.purpose: Final judgment and sentence for felony convictions in circuit court.

forms.title: Advice of Rights — Felony [UNVERIFIED]
forms.purpose: Advises a felony defendant of arraignment and plea rights.

families.name: Appellate Court Forms
families.description: Forms for Michigan Court of Appeals and Supreme Court practice. SCAO publishes limited appellate forms; many appellate filings follow MCR Chapter 7 format requirements.

forms.title: Claim of Appeal
forms.purpose: Initiates an appeal as of right to the Court of Appeals.

forms.title: Application for Leave to Appeal
forms.purpose: Seeks discretionary review by the Court of Appeals.

forms.title: Motion — Court of Appeals [UNVERIFIED]
forms.purpose: General motion form for the Court of Appeals.

forms.title: Transcript Order Form [UNVERIFIED]
forms.purpose: Orders trial transcripts from the court reporter for an appeal.

forms.title: Certificate of Mailing / Service — Appellate [UNVERIFIED]
forms.purpose: Proof of service for appellate filings.

forms.title: Application for Leave to Appeal to Michigan Supreme Court [UNVERIFIED]
forms.purpose: Seeks discretionary review by the Michigan Supreme Court.

forms.title: Appearance — Court of Appeals [UNVERIFIED]
forms.purpose: Attorney's entry of appearance in the Court of Appeals.
